summary: This is a brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky mentions he is heading to Los Angeles for Microsoft's Professional Developers Conference (PDC). He invites readers to visit the ASP Today/Apress booth to meet him and other Joel on Software readers, and offers free copies of FogBUGZ. The post lists his booth appearance schedule across three days.
key_points: Joel was attending Microsoft's PDC conference in Los Angeles
He had scheduled appearances at the ASP Today/Apress booth over three days
He used the blog as a community meetup coordination tool, inviting readers to connect in person
FogBUGZ was being promoted with free copies at the event
money_quotes: If you're at the PDC remember to ride your Segway into the ASP Today/Apress booth, say hi, meet other Joel on Software people, and get a free copy of FogBUGZ.
key_insight: A short logistics post using the blog as a channel to coordinate in-person meetups with readers at a tech conference.
